@if (vendor(); as currentVendor) {
{{ currentVendor.name.charAt(0) }}
{{ currentVendor.name }}
@if (currentVendor.greeting) {
"{{ currentVendor.greeting }}"
}
{{ playerGold() | number }} gold
@if (activeTab() === 'buy') {
@if (filteredBuyStock().length === 0) {

@if (currentVendor.stock.length === 0) { This vendor has no items for sale. } @else { No items match your search. }

} @else { @for (s of filteredBuyStock(); track s.itemId) {
@if (s.itemDefinition?.icon; as icon) { }
{{ s.itemDefinition?.name }}
@if (s.itemDefinition?.description) {
{{ s.itemDefinition?.description }}
}
{{ s.buyPrice | number }} @if (s.stockType === 'infinite') { ∞ stock } @else if (getStockRemaining(s) !== null) { {{ getStockRemaining(s) }} left } @else { Limited }
@if (canAfford(s)) { }
@if (expandedBuyId() === s.itemId) {
Total
{{ stepTotal() | number }}
}
} }
} @if (activeTab() === 'sell') {
@if (filteredSellItems().length === 0) {

@if (sellCount() === 0) { You have no items to sell. Drag items from your inventory here to sell them. } @else { No items match your search. }

} @else { @for (item of filteredSellItems(); track item.instanceId) {
@if (item.definition.icon; as icon) { } @else { T{{ item.definition.properties.tier }} }
{{ item.definition.name }} @if (item.quantity > 1) { ×{{ item.quantity }} }
{{ calculateSellPrice(item) | number }} 50% value
@if (expandedSellId() === item.instanceId) {
You receive
{{ stepTotal() | number }}
}
} }
} @if (hoveredItem()) { }
Gold {{ playerGold() | number }}
Bag {{ inventoryService.currentWeight() | number:'1.0-0' }} / {{ inventoryService.carryingCapacity() | number:'1.0-0' }} kg
{{ hint() }}
}
